text: 🇬🇧 "The peace dividend that we've enjoyed for the last 30 years is coming to an end." - UK's Head of the armed forces, Air Chief Marshal Richard Knighton. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Trump says his country is 'ready to use the full economic might of the US' to strengthen Hungary's economy. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042705169469837328/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel The Iranian delegation for nuclear talks with the U.S., led by Ghalibaf, has landed in Islamabad. The delegation arrived on two aircraft, the first flights to depart Iran since the start of the military campaign, with Iranian airspace still closed. The planes were escorted by Pakistani fighter jets. Flares were observed being deployed. The aircraft belong to Iranian airline Mraj (registration EP-AJJ and EP-SSN), departing from Gorgan airport. Mraj provides VIP and charter services to the ayatollah regime. @ItayBlumental tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 由卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）率领的伊朗核谈判代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡。代表团乘坐两架飞机抵达，这是自军事行动开始以来首批离开伊朗的航班，目前伊朗领空仍处于关闭状态。这些飞机由巴基斯坦战斗机护航。据观察，现场部署了照明弹。这些飞机属于伊朗Mraj航空公司（注册号EP-AJJ和EP-SSN），从戈尔甘机场起飞。Mraj为阿亚图拉政权提供贵宾和包机服务。@ItayBlumental 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 BREAKING | U.S. officials told the Wall Street Journal that additional attack aircraft (presumably A-10 Thunderbolt IIs) have recently landed in the Middle East, within the Central Command (CENTCOM) area of responsibility. 🪖 In the coming days, up to 2,000 soldiers from the Army's elite 82nd Airborne Division, as well as thousands of sailors and Marines, are expected to arrive. 🔹 The strike carrier group of the USS George H.W. Bush and the 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit (from the USS BOXER assault landing ship) are again heading toward the region; their arrival will likely take more than a week. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 快讯 | 美国官员告诉《华尔街日报》，额外的攻击机（推测为A-10“雷电II”攻击机）最近已降落在中东，位于中央司令部（CENTCOM）的责任区内。🪖 预计在未来几天内，来自陆军精锐第82空降师的多达2000名士兵，以及数千名水手和海军陆战队员将抵达。🔹 “乔治·H·W·布什”号航母打击群和第11海军陆战队远征队（来自“拳师”号两栖攻击舰）正再次向该地区进发；它们的抵达可能需要一周以上的时间。查看我们的最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: WarMonitor House Judiciary Democrats are calling on the White House physician to give the President a full cognitive test, citing concerns over his mental fitness and recent erratic behavior, and to share the results with Congress. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042699623928598529/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 众议院司法委员会民主党人呼吁白宫医生对总统进行全面的认知测试，理由是担心他的精神健康状况和最近的异常行为，并要求将结果告知国会。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042699623928598529/photo/1 推文

text: WarFront Witness pinned a photo
text_zh: WarFront Witness 置顶了一张照片

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 ☀️ ☀️ Iraq’s parliament is set to convene on Saturday 11 April to elect a new president, but deep political divisions threaten the session. In Iraq’s Muhasasa (sectarian power-sharing) system, the presidency is the “gatekeeper” — elected first in order to formally designate the prime minister. Traditionally the three top posts are negotiated as a single package, and the current deadlock stems from a fight over who gets the premiership before that gate is opened. Kurdistan Democratic Party leader Masoud Barzani said he will not proceed with any constitutional entitlement before the prime minister candidate is decided. The KDP and the State of Law coalition — led by Nouri al‑Maliki, who is aggressively pushing for a third term despite a reported US “soft veto” — announced a boycott of the session. Behind the boycott is a tactical trade: Maliki has reportedly promised to back a KDP president in exchange for KDP support for his own PM bid later. Several blocs have confirmed attendance: Reconstruction and Development Coalition led by outgoing Iraqi Prime Minister Sudani (who is vying to keep his job against Maliki’s challenge), Alliance of Nation State Forces led by Ammar al‑Hakim, Al‑Sadiqoun Bloc led by Qais Khazali the sanctioned leader of the Khazali Network, the Babylon Movement led by Rayan al‑Kildani the sanctioned militia leader of the Babylon Brigades, and Taqaddum led by influential Sunni leader Mohamed Al‑Halbousi — who recently described Iraq’s past experience with Maliki as “bitter” and signaled his opposition to Maliki’s return. The Kurdish New Generation movement, Kurdish National Stance Movement led by Ali Hama Saleh, the Kurdistan Islamic Union and the Kurdistan Justice Group also said they will attend — a move that challenges the traditional KDP‑PUK duopoly at a moment when the two major Kurdish parties are locked in their own civil war. The longstanding “gentleman’s agreement” that gave the PUK the Baghdad presidency while the KDP kept Erbil has collapsed; the KDP now argues its larger 27‑seat bloc entitles it to the federal presidency too, while the PUK refuses to surrender the post. PDK parliamentary Deputy speaker Farhad Atroushi opposed the session, citing a lack of national consensus. The boycott strategy relies on the “blocking third” — with over 110 MPs staying away, the required two‑thirds quorum of 220 out of 329 members cannot be met, legally preventing the session from starting. Parliamentary Speaker Haibat al‑Halbousi called on political leaders to attend and said he will publish names of absent MPs and the blocs that prevent their members from voting — a desperate “name and shame” tactic to pressure individual lawmakers to break party lines. Presidential candidate Asso Fereydoun said his nomination is conditional on a binding agreement among Kurdish blocs and will withdraw if no such accord is reached — a direct reflection of the fractured Kurdish house. The Sunni Azm coalition said its participation is contingent on consensus or a majority of the Shiite Coordination Framework, effectively handing the final say on the session’s success to the Shiite factions themselves. Chief Justice Faiq Zaidan issued a “code red” warning that the failure to implement constitutional texts puts the judiciary in a “real predicament”, turning the constitution into a “theoretical text” and leading to recurring political crises that undermine state prestige and development. Behind that warning lies the unspoken “nuclear option”: if parliament cannot fulfill its duty, the Federal Supreme Court could rule it negligent and trigger its dissolution, forcing fresh elections that most sitting MPs are desperate to avoid. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 ☀️ ☀️ 伊拉克议会定于4月11日星期六召开会议选举新总统，但严重的政治分歧威胁着会议的进行。在伊拉克的“配额制”（宗派权力分享）体系中，总统是“守门人”——首先选出总统以便正式任命总理。传统上，这三个最高职位是作为一个整体方案进行谈判的，目前的僵局源于在打开这扇大门之前，关于谁获得总理职位的争夺。库尔德斯坦民主党（KDP）领导人马苏德·巴尔扎尼（Masoud Barzani）表示，在总理候选人确定之前，他不会推进任何宪法权利。KDP和由努里·马利基（Nouri al-Maliki）领导的“法治国家”联盟——尽管据报道面临美国“软否决”，但马利基仍积极推动第三个任期——宣布抵制此次会议。抵制背后的战术交易是：据报道，马利基承诺支持KDP的总统人选，以换取KDP对他本人总理竞选的支持。几个集团已确认出席：由即将离任的伊拉克总理苏达尼（Sudani）领导的“重建与发展联盟”（他正力争保住职位以应对马利基的挑战）、由阿马尔·哈基姆（Ammar al-Hakim）领导的“国家力量联盟”、由卡扎里网络（Khazali Network）受制裁领导人凯斯·卡扎里（Qais Khazali）领导的“萨迪昆集团”（Al-Sadiqoun Bloc）、由巴比伦旅（Babylon Brigades）受制裁民兵领导人拉扬·基尔达尼（Rayan al-Kildani）领导的“巴比伦运动”，以及由有影响力的逊尼派领导人穆罕默德·哈尔布西（Mohamed Al-Halbousi）领导的“塔卡杜姆”（Taqaddum）——他最近形容伊拉克过去与马利基的经历是“痛苦的”，并表示反对马利基回归。库尔德“新一代”运动、由阿里·哈马·萨利赫（Ali Hama Saleh）领导的库尔德“民族立场”运动、库尔德斯坦伊斯兰联盟和库尔德斯坦正义小组也表示将出席——这一举动在两大库尔德政党陷入内战之际，挑战了传统的KDP-PUK双头垄断。长期以来给予PUK巴格达总统职位而KDP保留埃尔比勒职位的“君子协定”已经崩溃；KDP现在辩称其拥有更大的27个席位集团，使其也有权获得联邦总统职位，而PUK拒绝交出该职位。KDP议会副议长法哈德·阿特鲁什（Farhad Atroushi）反对召开会议，理由是缺乏全国共识。抵制策略依赖于“阻碍性三分之一”——由于超过110名议员缺席，无法达到329名成员中三分之二（220人）的法定人数，从而在法律上阻止了会议的开始。议会议长海巴特·哈尔布西（Haibat al-Halbousi）呼吁政治领导人出席，并表示将公布缺席议员的姓名以及阻止其成员投票的集团名单——这是一种绝望的“点名羞辱”策略，旨在向个别议员施压，要求他们打破党派路线。总统候选人阿索·费雷敦（Asso Fereydoun）表示，他的提名以库尔德集团之间的约束性协议为条件，如果达不成此类协议，他将退出——这直接反映了库尔德阵营的分裂。逊尼派“阿兹姆”（Azm）联盟表示，其参与取决于什叶派协调框架的共识或多数支持，实际上将会议成功的最终决定权交给了什叶派派系本身。首席大法官法伊克·扎伊丹（Faiq Zaidan）发出“红色代码”警告，称未能执行宪法条款使司法机构陷入“真正的困境”，将宪法变成“理论文本”，并导致反复出现的政治危机，损害国家威望和发展。该警告背后隐藏着未言明的“核选项”：如果议会不能履行职责，联邦最高法院可以裁定其失职并触发解散，迫使大多数在任议员极力避免的重新选举。@wfwitness

text: 📸 Al Jazeera shows heavily damaged AN/FPS-132 early warning radar at Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar, a key U.S. ballistic-missile detection system. The AN/FPS-132 early-warning radar at Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar is a $1.1 billion U.S.-built missile-warning system that detects ballistic missiles up to ~5,000 km and feeds data to regional defenses like THAAD and Patriot.
text_zh: 📸 半岛电视台展示了卡塔尔乌代德空军基地（Al Udeid Air Base）受损严重的AN/FPS-132预警雷达，这是美国关键的弹道导弹探测系统。卡塔尔乌代德空军基地的AN/FPS-132预警雷达是一个耗资11亿美元的美国制造导弹预警系统，可探测最远约5000公里的弹道导弹，并向“萨德”（THAAD）和“爱国者”等区域防御系统提供数据。

text: The U.S. is reinforcing its military presence in the Middle East ahead of upcoming U.S.–Iran negotiations in Pakistan. Fighter and attack aircraft have already arrived. 1,500–2,000 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division may deploy soon. The USS George H.W. Bush carrier strike group is en route from the Atlantic. The USS Boxer and the 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit are also heading to the region from the Pacific. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 美国正在加强其在中东的军事存在，以迎接即将到来的美伊巴基斯坦谈判。战斗机和攻击机已经抵达。第82空降师的1500至2000名士兵可能很快部署。乔治·H·W·布什号航母打击群正从大西洋赶来。“拳师”号和第11海军陆战队远征队也正从太平洋向该地区进发。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: WATCH: Qatar’s Al Jazeera shows, for the first time, the moment Iranian missiles struck Ras Laffan Industrial City, Qatar’s gas hub. The attacks caused major direct damage to critical infrastructure and had global repercussions.
text_zh: 观看：卡塔尔半岛电视台首次展示了伊朗导弹袭击卡塔尔天然气枢纽——拉斯拉凡工业城（Ras Laffan Industrial City）的瞬间。袭击对关键基础设施造成了直接的重大破坏，并产生了全球性影响。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 Al Jazeera released the moment an Iranian missiles hit Qatar’s Ras Laffan LNG site.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 半岛电视台发布了伊朗导弹击中卡塔尔拉斯拉凡液化天然气（LNG）站点的瞬间。

text: 🇺🇸 Donald Trump endorses Lindsey "Gay For War" Graham. For MAGA, this of course, must be some sort of 7D "keep your friends close, but your enemies closer" Chess Move. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普支持林赛·“为战争而同性恋”（Gay For War）·格雷厄姆。对于MAGA（让美国再次伟大）来说，这当然必须是某种7D“亲近你的朋友，但更要亲近你的敌人”的棋局。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇶🇦 Al Jazeera published a short montage of the destruction caused by Iranian strikes on Al-Udeid Air Base Power Plant. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇶🇦 半岛电视台发布了一段简短的蒙太奇视频，展示了伊朗袭击乌代德空军基地发电厂所造成的破坏。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Negotiation delegations in Pakistan:
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 在巴基斯坦的谈判代表团：

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Lebanon’s presidency announced that the U.S. administration has tasked the State Department with mediating between Lebanon and Israel, following a diplomatic initiative by Lebanese President Joseph Aoun. A phone call took place between the Lebanese and Israeli ambassadors in Washington, with the U.S. ambassador to Lebanon participating. The parties agreed to hold a first meeting on Tuesday at the State Department to discuss a ceasefire announcement and the start of negotiations under US auspices. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统府宣布，继黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）发起外交倡议后，美国政府已指派国务院在黎巴嫩和以色列之间进行调解。黎巴嫩和以色列驻华盛顿大使进行了通话，美国驻黎巴嫩大使也参与其中。双方同意于周二在国务院举行首次会议，讨论停火声明并开始在美国主持下的谈判。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Iran's negotiation delegation has landed in Pakistan. Ghalibaf and Araghchi reportedly flew on separate planes for security reasons. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042697035338449199/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗谈判代表团已降落在巴基斯坦。据报道，出于安全考虑，卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）和阿拉格希（Araghchi）乘坐了不同的飞机。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042697035338449199/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump has told aides he’s planning sweeping pardons for staff before leaving office, even saying he’d “pardon everyone who has come within 200 feet” of the Oval Office. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042696527613755410/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel IDF preparing for the collapse of U.S.-Iran negotiations and a return to war. Iran is redeploying air defense systems and attempting to restore access to bombed underground missile sites. - Kan News tweet

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Senator Lindsey Graham is doing a fantastic job. He is running against a LUNATIC named Mark Lynch, who supports perhaps the Worst Congressman in the History of our Country, Thomas Massie, of the Great Commonwealth of Kentucky. I don’t have to go into great detail, but needless to say, Mark Lynch would be a DISASTER for the Republican Party, and Lindsey Graham just, GETS THE JOB DONE. VOTE FOR LINDSEY ALL THE WAY. MAGA! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：参议员林赛·格雷厄姆（Lindsey Graham）做得非常出色。他正在与一个名叫马克·林奇（Mark Lynch）的疯子竞选，此人支持我们国家历史上最糟糕的国会议员——来自肯塔基州伟大联邦的托马斯·马西（Thomas Massie）。我不需要详述，但不用说，马克·林奇对共和党来说将是一场灾难，而林赛·格雷厄姆就是能把事情办成。全力投票给林赛。MAGA！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran’s negotiating team has arrived in Pakistan after departing Tehran earlier this evening. Iran’s Parliament Speaker is reportedly leading the delegation, also included; the Foreign Minister, the Defense Council Secretary, and the Governor of the Iranian Central Bank. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042695396128899254/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗谈判团队在今晚早些时候离开德黑兰后已抵达巴基斯坦。据报道，伊朗议会议长率领代表团，成员还包括外交部长、国防委员会秘书和伊朗中央银行行长。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042695396128899254/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Saudi Finance Minister Muhammad Al-Jadaan met with Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif in Islamabad. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042694360341401758/photo/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor There’s a civil war brewing inside MAGA, with some even calling to jail fellow influencers for opposing Trump. Many “turning” personalities knew all along who he was and are now just trying to jump ship, as Americans increasingly turn against his rhetoric. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042694125896474755/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor MAGA内部正在酝酿一场内战，一些人甚至呼吁监禁反对特朗普的同僚影响者。许多“倒戈”的人物一直都知道他是谁，现在只是试图跳船，因为美国人越来越反对他的言论。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042694125896474755/video/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz #BREAKING : Iran's negotiation delegation, led by Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, has arrived in Islamabad according to #Iran Mehr News Foreign Minister Seyyed Abbas Araqchi, Secretary of the Defense Council Ali Akbar Ahmadian, Central Bank Governor Abdolnaser Hemmati, and some members of parliament are accompanying Mr. Qalibaf on this trip. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz #快讯：据#伊朗 梅尔通讯社（Mehr News）报道，由议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）率领的伊朗谈判代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡。外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Seyyed Abbas Araqchi）、国防委员会秘书阿里·阿克巴尔·艾哈迈迪安（Ali Akbar Ahmadian）、中央银行行长阿卜杜勒纳赛尔·赫马蒂（Abdolnaser Hemmati）以及一些议会议员陪同卡利巴夫先生参加了此次访问。推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Iran says negotiations with the US will only proceed if 'preconditions are met' tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：伊朗表示，只有在“满足先决条件”的情况下，与美国的谈判才会进行。推文

text: Open Source Intel The Iranian delegation led by Parliament Speaker Qalibaf has arrived in Islamabad ahead of tomorrow's talks with the U.S., Iranian media reports. Iran continues messaging that the talks are conditional on its demands being met. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据伊朗媒体报道，由议会议长卡利巴夫率领的伊朗代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡，准备参加明天与美国的会谈。伊朗继续传达信息称，会谈以满足其要求为条件。推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - UK's Head of the armed forces message to the public: "The peace dividend that we've enjoyed for the last 30 years is coming to an end." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042692633038930371/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息——英国武装部队总参谋长对公众的致辞：“我们过去30年来享受的和平红利即将结束。”https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042692633038930371/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel UK Head of Armed Forces Air Chief Marshal Richard Knighton on the Strait of Hormuz: "It's not simply a naval problem... It'll need space effects, it'll need air effects, it'll need maritime capability... and I'm sure that the UK will play a part." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042692481528066420/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国武装部队总参谋长、空军上将理查德·奈顿（Richard Knighton）谈霍尔木兹海峡：“这不仅仅是一个海军问题……它需要太空效应、空中效应、海上能力……我相信英国会发挥作用。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042692481528066420/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 ⚡ Al Jazeera will release a documentary of the Al-Udeid US base in Qatar after Iranian missile attacks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 ⚡ 半岛电视台将在伊朗导弹袭击后发布一部关于卡塔尔乌代德美军基地的纪录片。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump has repeatedly promised mass pardons to White House staff, telling aides he'll pardon "everyone who has come within 200 feet of the Oval" before he leaves office. He has issued 1,600 pardons this term, including to allies, donors, and a Honduran president convicted of cocaine trafficking. In his first term he issued fewer than 250. Trump has discussed hosting a news conference to announce mass pardons before leaving office. Aides say he raises it so often they now laugh about it. Source: WSJ. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普一再承诺对白宫员工进行大规模赦免，告诉助手他将在离任前赦免“所有进入椭圆形办公室200英尺范围内的人”。他在本届任期内已经发布了1600项赦免，包括盟友、捐赠者和一名因贩毒被定罪的洪都拉斯总统。他在第一任期内发布的赦免不到250项。特朗普讨论过在离任前举行新闻发布会宣布大规模赦免。助手们说他提起这件事太频繁了，以至于他们现在对此一笑置之。来源：《华尔街日报》。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian delegation led by the country's parliament speaker has arrived in Pakistan for talks with the US.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 由该国议会议长率领的伊朗代表团已抵达巴基斯坦，准备与美国进行会谈。

text: Trump: Senator Lindsey Graham is doing a fantastic job. VOTE FOR LINDSEY ALL THE WAY. MAGA!
text_zh: 特朗普：参议员林赛·格雷厄姆做得非常出色。全力投票给林赛。MAGA！

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 A Pakistani fighter jet escorting the aircraft carrying the Iranian delegation as they arrive for negotiations with the U.S. in Islamabad. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 一架巴基斯坦战斗机正在护航载有伊朗代表团的飞机，他们抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行谈判。@wfwitness

text: Iranian officials land at Nur Khan Airbase in Islamabad under Pakistan Air Force fighter jet escort ahead of peace talks.
text_zh: 伊朗官员在巴基斯坦空军战斗机的护航下，降落在伊斯兰堡的努尔汗空军基地（Nur Khan Airbase），准备进行和平谈判。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Axios: U.S. Vice President Vance is set to lead high-stakes negotiations with Iran in Islamabad, signalling a shift toward more direct, high-level diplomacy after earlier efforts repeatedly collapsed. Vance was brought in after Iranian officials told the U.S. they believed U.S. Special Envoy Witkoff and Jared Kushner would deceive them. For Vance these negotiations are a big deal, with a U.S. describing as like the Super Bowl to him. The meeting would be the first high level meeting between the two countries since 1979. However, chances for success seem low with one U.S. official commenting that the two sides don’t agree on what they’re negotiating. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Axios：美国副总统万斯（Vance）将率领与伊朗在伊斯兰堡进行的高风险谈判，这标志着在早先的努力多次失败后，美国转向更直接、高层级的外交。万斯是在伊朗官员告诉美国他们认为美国特使威特科夫（Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）会欺骗他们之后被引入的。对于万斯来说，这些谈判是一件大事，美国方面形容这对他来说就像超级碗一样。这将是自1979年以来两国之间的首次高层会议。然而，成功的机会似乎很低，一位美国官员评论说，双方甚至在谈判内容上都无法达成一致。@wfwitness

text: WATCH: Destruction at Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar following Iranian strikes.
text_zh: 观看：伊朗袭击后卡塔尔乌代德空军基地的破坏情况。

text: The Pentagon has awarded Lockheed Martin a $4.7 billion contract to produce Patriot (PAC-3 MSE) interceptors. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 五角大楼已授予洛克希德·马丁公司一份价值47亿美元的合同，用于生产“爱国者”（PAC-3 MSE）拦截导弹。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: Trump has repeatedly suggested—sometimes jokingly—that he might issue sweeping pardons to aides before leaving office. In one meeting he said, “I’ll pardon everyone who has come within 200 feet of the Oval,” later shrinking the joke to “10 feet.” Source: WSJ
text_zh: 特朗普一再暗示——有时是开玩笑地——他可能会在离任前对助手进行大规模赦免。在一次会议上他说：“我会赦免所有进入椭圆形办公室200英尺范围内的人”，后来把这个玩笑缩小到“10英尺”。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike targets a Civil Defense team from the Health Authority in Deir Kifa, southern Lebanon, several injuries reported. Striking emergency responders is a war crime under international humanitarian law. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部代尔基法（Deir Kifa）卫生当局的一支民防队，据报道有多人受伤。根据国际人道主义法，袭击急救人员是战争罪。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 Israeli media: Ten rockets were launched from Lebanon towards Keriat Shmona, northern occupied territories.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列媒体：十枚火箭弹从黎巴嫩发射，目标是被占领土北部的基里亚特什莫纳。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted a Civil Defense team from the Health Authority in the town of Deir Kifa , in southern Lebanon resulting in several injuries. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部代尔基法镇卫生当局的一支民防队，导致多人受伤。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇧🇯 🇫🇷 Le Monde : French special forces are secretly conducting combat operations alongside the Beninese army in northern Benin against the growing jihadist threat. Officialy deployed as instructors, the SOF operators are used as a quick reaction force as the African country faces pressure from jihadist groups coming from Burkina Faso and Niger. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇧🇯 🇫🇷 《世界报》（Le Monde）：法国特种部队正在贝宁北部秘密与贝宁军队并肩进行作战行动，以应对日益严重的圣战威胁。这些特种作战人员名义上是作为教官部署的，但实际上被用作快速反应部队，因为该非洲国家正面临来自布基纳法索和尼日尔的圣战组织的压力。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has announced for the third time today that they targeted a gathering of soldiers and their vehicles in the vicinity of Al-Ishraq School in the city of Bint Jbeil with a rocket barrage. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党今天第三次宣布，他们用火箭弹袭击了宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）市Al-Ishraq学校附近的士兵及其车辆集结地。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli drone activity over Beirut and its suburbs. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drones have been operating over Beirut and its suburbs for over 3 hours at a very low altitude. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列无人机在贝鲁特及其郊区活动。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列无人机已在贝鲁特及其郊区上空以极低高度飞行超过3小时。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "IDF soldiers — the soldiers of the most moral army in the world," 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“以色列国防军士兵——世界上最道德军队的士兵，” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇱❌🇪🇸 Israel announced on Friday that it has expelled Spain from the United States’ Civil-Military Coordination Center (CMCC) in Kiryat Gat, a body established to oversee humanitarian and logistical operations related to Gaza. According to a statement from…" 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 Netanyahu said that countries that “wage a diplomatic war” against Israel will pay “an immediate price.” Israel will not remain silent in the face of those who attack us. Spain has defamed our heroes, IDF soldiers — the soldiers of the most moral army in the world, Those who attack Israel instead of terrorist regimes — whoever does so — will not be our partner regarding the future of the region. I am not prepared to tolerate this hypocrisy and this hostility. I do not intend to allow any country to wage a diplomatic war against us without paying an immediate price. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇱❌🇪🇸 以色列周五宣布，已将西班牙从美国在基里亚特加特（Kiryat Gat）的民事-军事协调中心（CMCC）中驱逐，该机构旨在监督与加沙有关的人道主义和后勤行动。根据一份声明……” 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 内塔尼亚胡表示，对以色列“发动外交战争”的国家将付出“即时代价”。面对那些攻击我们的人，以色列不会保持沉默。西班牙诽谤了我们的英雄，以色列国防军士兵——世界上最道德军队的士兵。那些攻击以色列而不是恐怖政权的人——无论谁这样做——都不会成为我们未来区域的伙伴。我准备不容忍这种虚伪和敌意。我不打算允许任何国家在不付出即时代价的情况下对我们发动外交战争。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇪🇸 In a post on X, Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said Netanyahu’s “contempt for life and international law is intolerable” in light of the attacks. “It’s time to speak clearly: – Lebanon must be included in the ceasefire. – The international community must…" 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 Israel announced on Friday that it has expelled Spain from the United States’ Civil-Military Coordination Center (CMCC) in Kiryat Gat, a body established to oversee humanitarian and logistical operations related to Gaza. According to a statement from the Israeli Foreign Ministry, the move was carried out in coordination with the United States, and Spain has been formally notified of the decision. The CMCC was set up to monitor the ceasefire but is heavily slanted to protecting Israeli interests in the ceasefire agreement. It was joined by at least 14 countries and dozens of international organizations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇪🇸 在X上的一篇帖子中，首相佩德罗·桑切斯（Pedro Sanchez）表示，鉴于这些袭击，内塔尼亚胡对生命和国际法的“蔑视是不可容忍的”。“是时候明确表态了：——黎巴嫩必须被纳入停火协议。——国际社会必须……” 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 以色列周五宣布，已将西班牙从美国在基里亚特加特的民事-军事协调中心（CMCC）中驱逐，该机构旨在监督与加沙有关的人道主义和后勤行动。根据以色列外交部的声明，此举是与美国协调进行的，西班牙已正式收到该决定通知。CMCC的设立是为了监督停火，但在停火协议中严重偏向保护以色列的利益。至少有14个国家和数十个国际组织加入了该中心。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 📸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 - The Pakistan Air Force ( #PAF ) escorted Iranian delegation planes as soon as they entered Pakistani airspace. The PAF 317 callsign belongs to a Saab 2000 EW aircraft most likely flying along fighter jets.
text_zh: 📸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 - 巴基斯坦空军（#PAF）在伊朗代表团飞机进入巴基斯坦领空后立即对其进行了护航。PAF 317呼号属于一架萨博2000预警机，很可能与战斗机一起飞行。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The Iranian delegation has entered Pakistani airspace. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗代表团已进入巴基斯坦领空。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
